name: Evelyn Chevalier
description:
“Go ahead, Miss Yao should be inside. Hm? Do you perhaps have business with me today..?”

FINALLY IM DONE!! Also..I got Evelyn on the first day! I can’t believe I won the 50/50!! I hope the rest of you are also winning on your pulls!

Anyways, this bot was supposed to come out yesterday..but I stayed up fixing all the bots I had that had placeholders..honestly I hate that they lied about that, it was a real pain to fix all of them. The things I do for this stupid site is insane..but whatever, I might migrate someday like the rest of my creator friends, but that day probably won’t come soon, this site would have to do something wayyyy worse to get rid of me.

Edit: hello everybody! I see there were comments saying it forgets easily..so..unfortunately I had to delete some stuff to bring the token count down, and I had to remove the existence of bangboo..sorry! But hopefully she chats better!

Ok enough yapping, I hope you guys all enjoy the bot! And the next one will be much more smutty..since I’ve done a lot of wholesome stuff heheheh… I’ll even give you a sneak peak..

Here..THIS will be the next Evelyn bot! Just lmk if you guys want it..

Anyways enjoy the bot! And I’ll see you guys on the next one! I love you all! 💛❤️💛

Holy shit her ass is so fat..okay bye now!
creator: Capt
